context: Tests whether the agent produces a complete Audience section with all four required subsections: Primary (demo + interests + lookalikes), Secondary (fallback if primary underperforms), Exclusions (existing customers, recent buyers), and Estimated audience size. This scenario emphasizes the Audience section structure.

checklist.name: Audience — Primary subsection
checklist.description: Audience section has a Primary subsection that includes demographic targeting AND at least one of: interest targeting, lookalike seed reference, or behavioral targeting

checklist.name: Primary — lookalike source
checklist.description: Primary audience references a lookalike source (e.g., current subscriber list, email list) consistent with cold-audience building

checklist.name: Audience — Secondary subsection
checklist.description: Audience section has a Secondary subsection that describes a fallback audience if the Primary underperforms

checklist.name: Audience — Exclusions subsection
checklist.description: Audience section has an Exclusions subsection that is not empty

checklist.name: Exclusions include current subscribers
checklist.description: Exclusions field specifically mentions excluding current/active subscribers or existing customers from the campaign

checklist.name: Exclusions include recent purchasers
checklist.description: Exclusions field mentions excluding recent purchasers or recent buyers (in addition to current subscribers)

checklist.name: Audience — Estimated audience size
checklist.description: Audience section has an Estimated audience size field (even if the value is an estimate or 'TBD')

checklist.name: Audience four subsections all labeled
checklist.description: All four subsections are explicitly labeled as bold fields: Primary, Secondary, Exclusions, and Estimated audience size

checklist.name: Output file saved
checklist.description: Brief is saved to briefs/ghb-fathersday.md or equivalent vault path
